ham.subject: Upcoming Antivirus Patch: Version 4.3 – Maintenance Window
ham.body:
Dear Employees,

The IT Security Team will deploy the latest version of our enterprise antivirus (Version 4.3) during the scheduled maintenance window from 10:30 PM to 12:30 AM IST tomorrow. This update includes critical security patches and performance improvements.

What you need to know:
- Your workstation may reboot automatically during the window.
- Any open documents will be temporarily saved.
- No action is required from you unless you encounter an error on startup.

If you notice any issue after the update, please open a Service Desk ticket (ticketing at <URL>). The IT team will resolve it within 24 hours.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: !!! Immediate Action Required: Your CryptoRewards Account Has Been Suspended !!!
spam.body:
Dear CryptoRewards User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your account that violates our Terms & Conditions. As a result, your account has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets.

To avoid permanent shutdown and to recover your pending rewards, you must verify your identity NOW. Failure to respond within 24 hours will result in loss of all unclaimed earnings.

Verify your account by clicking the link below:
<URL>

This is an official notice from the CryptoRewards Compliance Department. Do NOT ignore or delay.

Thank you for your immediate cooperation.

Sincerely,
CryptoRewards Security Team
